nodes.label: GeneSpace Contract Design
nodes.summary: Design making GeneSpace the canonical owner of flat search-space identity, validation, signatures, JSON export, and reproducibility hashing.

nodes.label: Canonical GeneSpace signature
nodes.summary: JSON-safe payload including schema_version, ordered genes, has_names, length, and per-gene fixed metadata.

edges.rationale: The GeneSpace contract defines signature, hash, to_dict, to_json, and validation.
Gene-space signatures and optimizer config hashes are separate reproducibility identities used together.
